notes: Post-match click crash fixed (signal handlers null-guarded). Match timer progress bar added to HUD — current time / countdown / quarter ticks. HOME page now opens with a big profile snippet card: avatar, nickname, level, XP, PULSE, SURGE, kills/wins/matches.
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows. Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
